products.name: Basic Hoodie
products.description: A basic black hoodie built for everyday wear. Made from soft, comfortable fabric with a relaxed fit, it features a classic hood, long sleeves, and a practical front pocket. Simple, clean, and reliable for casual use.

products.name: Basic Black Denim
products.description: Black Jeans are our new denim style, designed with a modern barrel-shaped leg that narrows slightly at the ankle and features a cropped length for a contemporary look. The jeans come with practical front and back pockets and a classic denim finish that makes them easy to style for everyday wear.

products.name: Basic White Tee
products.description: A classic white men’s tee designed for everyday comfort and easy styling. Made from soft, breathable fabric, it features a clean look with a regular fit that works well on its own or layered under jackets and shirts. Simple, versatile, and essential for any casual wardrobe.
